_comment: Lanes are REUSABLE NATO slots (alpha..echo + chore-modularize): the worktree is a persistent execution slot; the task/role/allowed_paths/skills are reassigned per round via the .pm bus. PM-owned (single writer). 'name' (friendly) is decoupled from 'branch' so we never have to rename a branch mid-round.
namingConvention: Slots: alpha, bravo, charlie, delta, echo, chore-modularize. A slot takes a fresh feat/<area> or chore/<area> branch per assignment. NEVER rename a branch with an open PR or mid-round. Physical `git worktree move` only when that slot's VS Code window is CLOSED.
_reconciled: 2026-06-16Tm — Back-Office Wave 1 round assigned (files: outbox/<slot>/2026-06-16m__*.md; prior round moved to .pm/archive/<slot>/). Redesign #46 is LIVE. DISJOINT path ownership so all 6 run in parallel. Foundation (chore-modularize) lands FIRST; UI lanes rebase onto it. Run /start-lane in each window. Plan: docs/backoffice/ROADMAP.md · contracts: docs/backoffice/CONTRACTS.md.

slots.name: chore-modularize
slots.task: FOUNDATION: back-office shell + scope-aware nav + /back-office route subtree + reusable ComingSoon + back-office home + Users&Roles/Org&Catalog admin stubs + working stub files at reports/territories paths. LANDS FIRST (gates the UI lanes).

slots.name: alpha
slots.task: REPORTING API (contract owner): GET /api/reports/catalog, POST /api/reports/query, /api/reports/saved CRUD over the existing read-model. Corporate-scope, RBAC read-down, problem+json. Publish C2 shapes in first commit.

slots.name: charlie
slots.task: REPORT BUILDER UI (flagship): metrics x dimensions x period -> run -> table+chart -> CSV/XLSX export (exceljs head start in stash@{0}) -> save. Depends on Foundation (rebase after it lands) + alpha C2 (mock until live).

slots.name: bravo
slots.task: TERRITORY EXPLORER + scorecard drill-down: sortable/filterable list of all in-scope territories -> per-territory scorecard (/back-office/territories/:id). Reads existing /api/territories + read-model. Depends on Foundation.

slots.name: delta
slots.task: INFRA/CI: harden deploy.sh (auto-detect region; reconcile RG-meta(eastus2) vs resources(centralus); add --code-only mode) + ensure CI builds backoffice/** on PRs. Independent lane.

slots.name: echo
slots.task: e2e/QA: drive /back-office nav (corporate-only RBAC), report-builder happy path, territory drill-down; extend smoke-api.sh with /api/reports/*. Carries cherry-picked 5cf991b assertion-hardening. Runs last.
